programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: Bhide finds out that Tapu has sold his scooter and gets very upset. Daya learns of the news and has to help Tapu retrieve the scooter.

programme.desc: Jethalal goes looking for Bhide's scooter in order to return it to him. However, the thieves are planning on selling it.

programme.desc: The residents are tired of waiting helplessly for the scooter and decide to take matters into their own hands, but Jethalal finally comes back with it. However, Bhide doubts it is really his.
